architecture.summary: SKILL.md + evals.json, report schema defined with playwrightConfig field, one-test-per-AC default with journey grouping option

integrations.summary: sw:done Gate 2a invokes sw:e2e --run instead of direct playwright; skill writes e2e-report.json consumed by Gate 2a

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI skill with no UI

performance.summary: N/A - skill orchestrates Playwright, no perf concerns beyond test execution time

security.summary: N/A - no auth/data/secrets handling, skill reads spec.md and writes test files

edge-cases.summary: Missing Playwright: fail with guidance (detect package.json vs absent); a11y violations map to triggering AC or page URL for standalone
